name: Chilled Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions and allow to cool.
2. Rinse arame and drain thoroughly. Soak in enough water to cover for 20 minutes, then drain and set aside.
3. Steam peas until tender and allow to cool.
4. Combine the steamed peas, chopped vegetables (yellow squash), scallions, and daikon in a large bowl.
5. Gently fold the cooked rice into the vegetable mixture.
6. Whisk together sesame oil, rice vinegar, and tamari in a small bowl.
7. Toss the dressing into the rice and vegetable mixture until well combined.
8. Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Per serving: 430 calories; 7g protein; 20mg sodium; 56g carbohydrates; 20g fat; 0mg cholesterol; 41mg calcium
